# ctest19

This file will become your README and also the index of your
documentation.

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install ctest19 in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure ctest19 package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to ctest19
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/sky1ove/ctest19):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/sky1ove/ctest19.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/sky1ove/ctest19)

``` sh
$ conda install -c sky1ove ctest19
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/ctest19/)

``` sh
$ pip install ctest19
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/sky1ove/ctest19)’s
[pages](https://sky1ove.github.io/ctest19/). Additionally you can find
package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/sky1ove/ctest19) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/ctest19/) respectively.
